title: AdminTool
description: A powerful admin-only gui that lets you summon lightning, cause explosions, heal, or launch players with ease. Perfect for server moderation, events, and showcasing power with epic effects and full customization.
body:
# Plugin Name: AdminTool

A powerful admin-only tool that grants control over nature and chaos. 
With a single stick, admins can summon lightning, trigger explosions, heal instantly, launch players, or create shockwaves. 
Each power executes with smooth particles, sounds, and configurable cooldowns for safe use during moderation or events. 
Perfect for showcasing authority, testing mechanics, or adding dramatic effects on Minecraft servers.
